news.title:
Neuland Labs appoints Saharsh Davuluri as CEO & MD; 18 years with firm.
Firm tripled contract services revenue in 3 years; plans peptide capacity expansion.
news.summary:
Neuland Labs appoints Saharsh Davuluri as CEO & MD; 18 years with firm.
Firm tripled contract services revenue in 3 years; plans peptide capacity expansion.

news.title:
Davuluri Saharsh Rao disclosed share encumbrance details under SEBI (SAST) Regulations for Neuland Laboratories Ltd.
96,000 shares (0.75% of total capital) were pledged to Aditya Birla Money Ltd for personal borrowing on 25/03/2026.
news.summary:
Davuluri Saharsh Rao disclosed share encumbrance details under SEBI (SAST) Regulations for Neuland Laboratories Ltd.
96,000 shares (0.75% of total capital) were pledged to Aditya Birla Money Ltd for personal borrowing on 25/03/2026.

news.title:
Vijay Kedia invests ₹289 Cr in infra, pharma, and PSU sectors, seeing market dips as short-term corrections.
Stocks like Neuland Labs and Patel Engineering highlight strong ROCE, aligning with Kedia's long-term bullish stance.
news.summary:
Vijay Kedia invests ₹289 Cr in infra, pharma, and PSU sectors, seeing market dips as short-term corrections.
Stocks like Neuland Labs and Patel Engineering highlight strong ROCE, aligning with Kedia's long-term bullish stance.

news.title:
Neuland Labs' Dec 2025 net sales rose 10.5% Y-o-Y to Rs 439.7 cr, but net profit fell 60.1% to Rs 40.4 cr.
EPS dropped to Rs 31.5 from Rs 79.0 Y-o-Y. Shares closed at Rs 13,890, returning 4.5% over 6 months.
news.summary:
Neuland Labs' Dec 2025 net sales rose 10.5% Y-o-Y to Rs 439.7 cr, but net profit fell 60.1% to Rs 40.4 cr.
EPS dropped to Rs 31.5 from Rs 79.0 Y-o-Y. Shares closed at Rs 13,890, returning 4.5% over 6 months.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories targets 20% CAGR via peptide pipeline expansion.
The company plans capacity growth by FY27 to achieve this target.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories targets 20% CAGR via peptide pipeline expansion.
The company plans capacity growth by FY27 to achieve this target.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories reported Q3FY26 revenue of Rs. 447.8 Cr, up 11.4% YoY, but EBITDA margins dipped to 19%.
CMS revenue grew through new project orders and peptides traction, while GDS saw key contributions from Ezetimibe and Mirtazapine.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories reported Q3FY26 revenue of Rs. 447.8 Cr, up 11.4% YoY, but EBITDA margins dipped to 19%.
CMS revenue grew through new project orders and peptides traction, while GDS saw key contributions from Ezetimibe and Mirtazapine.

news.title: Neuland Laboratories' Q3 revenue rose to 4.4B INR from 3.98B INR YoY.
news.summary: Neuland Laboratories' Q3 revenue rose to 4.4B INR from 3.98B INR YoY.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories will announce Q3 FY26 results on Feb 9, 2026, followed by an earnings call at 17:30 IST.
Neuland Labs, a leading API manufacturer, operates in 80 countries with 995 regulatory filings and multiple global certifications.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories will announce Q3 FY26 results on Feb 9, 2026, followed by an earnings call at 17:30 IST.
Neuland Labs, a leading API manufacturer, operates in 80 countries with 995 regulatory filings and multiple global certifications.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories' 5-year TSR outperforms its EPS growth, with TSR at 940% and EPS growing 44% annually.
Despite recent 18% drop in share price, long-term investors gained 60% annually; P/E ratio stands at 70.7.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories' 5-year TSR outperforms its EPS growth, with TSR at 940% and EPS growing 44% annually.
Despite recent 18% drop in share price, long-term investors gained 60% annually; P/E ratio stands at 70.7.

news.title:
Indian API makers like Divi's, Laurus, and Neuland are gaining prominence in the global API market amid China's supply disruptions.
Divi's Labs saw a 19.3% revenue growth in FY25, while Laurus and Neuland posted strong Q2FY26 performance with robust profit growth.
news.summary:
Indian API makers like Divi's, Laurus, and Neuland are gaining prominence in the global API market amid China's supply disruptions.
Divi's Labs saw a 19.3% revenue growth in FY25, while Laurus and Neuland posted strong Q2FY26 performance with robust profit growth.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories cancels Analyst/Investor Meet scheduled for Dec 10, 2025.
Event included NDR and group/one-on-one meets with B K Securities in Hyderabad.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories cancels Analyst/Investor Meet scheduled for Dec 10, 2025.
Event included NDR and group/one-on-one meets with B K Securities in Hyderabad.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories plans analyst/investor meets on Dec 4-5, 2025 in Mumbai.
Event includes Nuvama's Non-Deal Roadshow with group and one-on-one meetings.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories plans analyst/investor meets on Dec 4-5, 2025 in Mumbai.
Event includes Nuvama's Non-Deal Roadshow with group and one-on-one meetings.

news.title:
Neuland Laboratories approved Rs. 189 Cr capex for a new R&D center.
The Hyderabad center covers 1.35 lakh sq.ft, funded by borrowings and accruals.
news.summary:
Neuland Laboratories approved Rs. 189 Cr capex for a new R&D center.
The Hyderabad center covers 1.35 lakh sq.ft, funded by borrowings and accruals.

news.title:
Neuland, Lupin, Divi's delivered strong results due to robust domestic demand and thriving CDMO businesses.
US generics face margin pressures, with gRevlimid-related revenues continuing to decline.
news.summary:
Neuland, Lupin, Divi's delivered strong results due to robust domestic demand and thriving CDMO businesses.
US generics face margin pressures, with gRevlimid-related revenues continuing to decline.

news.title:
India Inc's Q2 earnings reveal profit surges, with 108 firms including Tata Steel, Bharti Airtel, and Suzlon Energy doubling profits.
Standout sectors include renewables, PSUs, and consumption plays, with some firms reporting profit growth over 100 times YoY.
news.summary:
India Inc's Q2 earnings reveal profit surges, with 108 firms including Tata Steel, Bharti Airtel, and Suzlon Energy doubling profits.
Standout sectors include renewables, PSUs, and consumption plays, with some firms reporting profit growth over 100 times YoY.

news.title:
Neuland Labs reported a strong 30% EBITDA margin this quarter.
Management withheld margin guidance, citing exchange rates and product mix as key factors.
news.summary:
Neuland Labs reported a strong 30% EBITDA margin this quarter.
Management withheld margin guidance, citing exchange rates and product mix as key factors.

news.title:
Neuland Labs avoided quarterly guidance but Q2 FY26 results show growth alignment.
Concall update confirms tracking toward growth expectations despite no specific guidance.
news.summary:
Neuland Labs avoided quarterly guidance but Q2 FY26 results show growth alignment.
Concall update confirms tracking toward growth expectations despite no specific guidance.
